select_when: People already know the right move, but stress, temptation, distraction, or impulse keeps defeating execution.
Long-term goals are repeatedly losing to short-term urges or reactive time management.
The environment can be redesigned so behavior depends less on willpower and more on routines and prompts.
The bottleneck is follow-through, attention discipline, or emotional regulation rather than missing knowledge.
avoid_when: Failure is being treated as a moral flaw even though sleep, incentives, or environment design are the real issue.
The team is using self-control rhetoric to justify endless deliberation instead of choosing and acting.
